result.stdout:
Description:
  Junit.Merge is a .NET tool designed to merge multiple JUnit XML files into a single XML file

Usage:
  Junit.Merge [options]

Options:
  --output <output>        The output JUnit XML file path [default: merged-20260328035644-junit.xml]
  --directory <directory>  The directory to search for JUnit XML files [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-junit.merge-1.0.0-4e20dfed31a74514aae90d89abd2c4db]
  --pattern <pattern>      The file search pattern [default: *.xml]
  --remove-system-out      Remove <system-out> nodes from the merged XML
  --remove-system-err      Remove <system-err> nodes from the merged XML
  --verbose                Enable verbose logging
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
